name: Token expiry uses wrong comparison
goal: `pkg/auth.py::is_expired` should treat `now >= exp` as expired but uses `>`. Inspired by JWT exp edge cases.

gold_fix.new_body:
def is_expired(exp, now):
    return now >= exp

inspired_by: Pattern: JWT/token exp boundary (RFC7519-style) off-by-one at exact expiry instant. Synthetic.
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
